review_title: Uncat: Making Expense Tracking Easy for Everyone
description: My overall experience with Uncat has been positive, as it simplifies expense tracking and reporting and has a user friendly interface. This makes it easy to navigate and the automated features save a lot of time. Overall, it’s a valuable tool for managing finances effectively.
author: Prachi K.
pros: I am impressed by the automated expense tracking feature of the app. It allows its users to capture and categorize expenses through mobile and web applications, making it easier to monitor spending in real time. It integrates seamlessly with other tools. Also the implementation is easy.
cons: There are no major bottlenecks except the fact that their basic plan has limited features, which might not be enough as businesses grow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Unleash Simplicity, Fix your transactions with Uncat
description: Overall experience has been good as it saved lot of time, moreover the easiness in using the tool
author: Shyamal M.
pros: Effortless process to fix unrecognized transactions and streamlining the accounting process, client Collaborations, Integration with Accounting tools and time saving application
cons: Difficulty in syncing with certain accounting software and specific versions, Limitations to customizations
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Overall my experience with this has been very positive. It ability to integrate with accounting software is smooth and the interface is intuitive for both accountants and clients.
author: Ankit S.
pros: It efficiently simplifies the process of collecting missing transaction details from client. Its integration with other platform like Quickbooks and Xero makes it incredibly easy to sync data. Its easy to use interface ensures minimal training is required. Its ability to automate reminder and client friendly portal significantly reduce manual follow-ups.
cons: Its customization has very limited option. The reporting feature could be more robust for deeper insights.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: So with my overall experience (depending on the person though) it was easy and very useful for me to use for my benefit and to grow from. I had no major issues so I think this company is great !
author: Joshua M.
pros: I can say I am impressed by the automated tracking feature from this app. it lets its users capture and categorize spendings through mobile and online web applications, making it so much easier to track spending right away.
cons: their basic plan has short list of limited features, which in my personal opinion is gonna be difficult and not so easy for company to grow from.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Uncat helps to our company account department to saves there time, reduce errors.

pros: Uncat helps to smooth communication between accounts and the company customers, helps them sort out and maintain properly transaction.
cons: Uncat has very less customization and limited features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I'm enjoying using it for my ecommerce business so far.

review_title: Easy Transaction Sorting and Quick Client Updates
description: Uncat’s user experience is streamlined and intuitive, focusing on transaction categorization. It sync directly with QuickBooks and Xero, reducing tedious manual work. Clients update transaction details via a simple link, cutting down on back-and-forth communication. It’s fast, efficient, and highly effective for firms managing high transaction volumes
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Efficient Transaction Management categorizing uncategorized transactions, with easy syncs to QuickBooks and Xero.
cons: Pricing Per Client: Charges are monthly per client!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: POV of Endusers to manage a documents
description: It helps in the management of my undesired transactions.It facilitates communication with my clientele.
author: sagar S.
pros: I appreciate that files can be arranged into categories and subcategories, making it easier to retrieve those files with a user-friendly interface. The ability to import and export files in various formats is also quite excellent.
cons: I detest its customisation constraints since they impede operational efficiency. Additionally, I found the software pricing to be quite high, thus it may not be a good fit for small or medium-sized enterprises.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Support was non-responsive. Tried MULTIPLE times to terminate account (as their system will no let you do it yourself). Conveniently they never responded to requests for several weeks now. Looks like I will be forced to dispute on my cc. NOT A GOOD WAY TO transact business. BEWARE
author: Troy P.
pros: Simple - not too many features. Easy to connect to Xero and QuickBooks.
cons: Simple - not too many features and for the price (recently doubled) there are better options. Cannot work with transactions older than 4 months old without paying back all the way... Makes cleanup jobs very costly. Does not show they are committed to their accountants, just their wallet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Wonderful. I got all my issues resolved with speed and I got all the software I needed for my business at a great price.
author: April S.
pros: They were very professional and knew what they were doing in all aspects. They were personalable while still being professional.
cons: Sometimes it was hard to get a hold of them when they were busy.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Easy Transaction Management with a few holes
description: Uncat has been working well for uncategorized transactions. Simplifies what used to be a tedious process and makes sure nothing gets lost. There’s still some room for improvement on integrations and reporting but overall the core is solid and I can see the difference.
author: Ashok B.
pros: Uncat is good at simplifying the communication around uncategorized transactions. The real time updates save time and being able to request client feedback within the app streamlines the workflow. I also like the simplicity of the interface, it’s very user friendly even for non techy clients. The document upload feature ensures every transaction has context so there’s less follow up questions.
cons: Uncat is good for basic transaction management but lacks some advanced features like deeper integration with accounting software beyond the big 4. The mobile app could also use some work, it’s not as smooth or intuitive as the desktop version. For larger teams some reporting and analytics would be nice to track client interaction and efficiency.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Kurtis C.
pros: I love the ease of use that Uncat provides to our church and accounting firm. One place to go to update information. Integration with QBO is great!
cons: I have not encountered anything that I don't like about Uncat.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Effortless Document Collection and Organization with Uncat
description: My overall experience has been extremely positive. The platform has streamlined our document management process, especially when it comes to handling uncategorized transactions. What I love most is its intuitive interface and how seamlessly it integrates with accounting software like QuickBooks. It has saved our team a lot of time by simplifying communication between clients and our accounting team. Instead of endless back-and-forth emails, we can request and receive missing details directly within the platform. The real-time updates and notifications make sure nothing gets overlooked.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most is how it simplifies the process of tracking uncategorized transactions. It's a game-changer for accountants and business owners. I love how Uncat eliminates the back-and-forth emails by allowing clients to upload documents and categorize transactions directly. This saves so much time and keeps everything organized in one place.
cons: Uncat has limited customization options for categorizing and organizing the data. While the tool is useful for managing uncategorized transactions, I found that it could benefit from more flexible tagging or filtering features to better suit specific business needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall I had a great experience with Uncat by far the best around
author: Kevin A.
pros: How easy it was to use and integrate setup was a breeze
cons: The price was a little high for my liking but it wasnt too expensive
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall its a realiable software & can operate smoothly after a little ammount of practicing, although it may require some additional features to be added for customising.

pros: I like the features of organizing files into the category & subcategories manner, it provides user-friendly interface & ease of operation to access those files, also the features for importing & exporting files in different formats is pretty impressive.
cons: I dislike the its limitations of customisation as a result it reduces the efficiency of operation, also the pricing of software i found pretty expensive so it might be not a good fit for small or medium scale industries.

description: To have software that is actually useful and inexpensive and still getting the results you need is all beneficial!

description: Uncat is time-saving and insightful. Uncat's features for categorizing, tagging, and connecting summaries make it easy to manage information.

review_title: saying goodbye to using spreadsheets for accounting!
description: Say goodbye to endless spreadsheets and the wild goose chase of chasing down clients! With Uncat, categorizing transactions becomes a breeze. No more hunting for receipts or nagging clients—just smooth syncing, automatic updates, and a dashboard that does the heavy lifting. It's accounting, but way more fun!

review_title: Streamlining Document Collection for Accounting Firms
description: Uncat provides a functional interface for document management but lacks branding customization options, making it difficult for firms to maintain a cohesive professional identity with clients.
author: Madan C.
pros: Using Uncat has been a highly beneficial experience, significantly improving document management and streamlining client interactions for accounting and bookkeeping activities.
cons: Uncat simplifies document requests for accountants by offering a unified platform to efficiently request, track, and organize client files.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
